summary: The diff implements all four requirements. Backend main.mo adds hostAddPlayer and searchPlayersByName functions. useQueries.ts adds useSearchPlayers and useHostAddPlayer hooks. HostSessionDashboard.tsx integrates the Add Player Manually UI. The file summaries confirm the hooks and UI are present. However, due to truncation, some acceptance criteria details (case-insensitive search, duplicate guard, host-only validation, game-type agnosticism in backend, exclusion of already-added players from results) cannot be fully confirmed from the diff content alone, though there are no positive signs of omission.
